description: Keep track of all birthdays of your family and friends.

name: Birthday-Tracker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Dependencies
- bump ``typescript`` to ``5.9.3``
- bump ``esbuild`` to ``0.25.10``
- bump ``@types/bun`` to ``1.2.23``
- bump ``obsidian`` to ``1.10.0``
- bump ``biome`` to ``2.25`` & migrate code

## Fixes
- correct calculation of date (#72)
- migrate to bun lock file (instead of lockb)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Dependencies
- bump ``@types/node`` from ``22.5.5`` to ``24.0.15``
- bump ``@esbuild`` from ``0.25.4`` to ``0.25.8``

## Features
- Implement #15 with #58 - Setting to enable/disable opening of birthday view on start of Obsidian
 - suggested by @Slava-Nik, @Bekzat158 and @ulahcherubim

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Dependencies
- dump ``typescript`` from ``5.7.2`` to ``5.8.3``
- dump ``obsidian`` from ``1.7.2`` to ``1.8.7``
- dump ``builtin-module`` from ``4.0.0`` to ``5.0.0``
- dump ``esbuild`` from ``0.25.0`` to ``0.25.4``

## Refactor
- Enhance naming
- Add more readonly
- Extract ``DateFormatter``to test date formatting logic

## Testing
- Add Test for ``Person``, to chek that birthday is evaluated correctly
- Add Tests for ``DateFormatter``
- Adapt ``Birthday``to use ``DateFormatter``

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Dependencies
- bump esbuild from ``0.23.1`` to ``0.24.0``
- bunp obsidian from ``1.6.6`` to ``1.7.2``

## Dependabot
- changed schedule to ``weekly``

## Others
- formatted with @biomejs
- made fields readonly
- used spread operator instread of ``Object.assign()`` (sonar-issue)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- enabled Dependabot with workflow to update bun lock file on new pr by @dependabot
- added build step to CI
- renamed workflow from Linter to CI
- integrated biome
- fixed biome issues

## Dependencies
- esbuild from ``0.17.3`` -> ``0.23.0``
- typescript from ``4.7.4`` -> ``5.5.4``
- tslib from ``2.4.0`` -> ``2.6.3``
- builtin-modules from ``3.3.0`` -> ``4.0.0``
- @types/node from ``16.18.108`` -> ``22.2.0``
- obsidian from ``latest`` to ``1.6.6``

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- migrated from npm to bun
- added logic to automaticly release plugin with ``make release``

## Bugs
- fixed ``hasBirthdayThisYear`` calculation by @SmartDen in #16

releases.description: Fixed age (was NaN).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Integrated current age of the person inside ``()`` after the name.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: used sentence case in UI (settings had one not in this case).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added check if line contains name and birthday. So now including persons in a code block like this is possible:
```
name=Peter Rudolf; birthday=17/08/2033
name=Hans Ap; birthday=01/05/2004
```
Was mentioned in the issue #1.

releases.author: Raboro
releases.description:
- removed plugin prefix in command
- changed desrciption to follow the obsidian guidelines
- used getLeavesOfType instead of detachLeaves
- intead of iterating through all files to get the birthday file, set the location of the birthday file in the settings
- updated doc
